_provenance: schema-derived from AC5 of R3b acceptance criteria. TP and VWAP Breakdown both True — this is the paired live-vs-replay fixture that exposes the autotuner inversion bug. Live resolves to VWAP Breakdown; pre-fix autotuner resolves to Take-Profit. Both must resolve to VWAP Breakdown after the fix.
description: TP + VWAP Breakdown both fire. VWAP Breakdown wins (priority 0 beats priority 1). This is the canonical parity regression case.
parity_note: This pair exposes the inversion: autotuner.py:476 checks is_tp_hit before is_vwap_broken, so pre-fix replay returns Take-Profit instead of VWAP Breakdown. After the shared resolver is introduced, both paths return VWAP Breakdown.
